description: Use this API to apply an unbalanced fault at a bus during dynamic simulations. This API routine was first introduced in release 35.1.0. ierr = dist_bus_fault_3(units, basekv, options, values)

parameters.name: units
parameters.description: Units in which fault admittance or impedance is specified in values. (input; 1 by default).

parameters.name: basekv
parameters.description: Base voltage in kv used to calculate the per unit fault admittance if units is 2 or 3; ignored if units is 1. if basekv is specified as 0.0, the base voltage of bus ibus is used. (input; 0.0 by default).

parameters.name: options
parameters.description: An array of five elements specifying options and values. The first element of OPTIONS defines the option to be used in the construction of the sequence admittance matrices; the remaining entries define the fault to be applied. (input).

parameters.name: values
parameters.description: An array of six elements specifying values used to define the fault. The first two elements of VALUES define the fault admittance or impedance to be used in the simulation; the remaining entries are used to define the fault if phase voltages are to be calculated during the simulation. (input).

options.description: transformer impedance correction option (1 by default).
do not apply to zero sequence.
bus to be faulted (no default allowed).

node number of a substation node connected to the specified bus; this defines the bus section to be faulted. If 0 is specified for a bus in a substation, the ‘parent’ bus is faulted; 0 must be specified for a bus that is not in a substation (0 by default).

values.description: real component of the complex fault admittance or impedance according to the value specified for UNITS (0.0 by default).
reactive component of the complex fault admittance or impedance according to the value specified for UNITS (-2.0E11 by default).
resistance of the complex L-G (if OPTIONS(3) is 1) or L-L (if OPTIONS(2) is 2) fault impedance in pu (0.0 by default).
reactance of the complex L-G (if OPTIONS(3) is 1) or L-L (if OPTIONS(2) is 2) fault impedance in pu (0.0 by default).
resistance of the complex L-G fault impedance in pu (if OPTIONS(2) is 2) (0.0 by default).
reactance of the complex L-G fault impedance in pu (if OPTIONS(2) is 2) (0.0 by default).

error_codes.description: STRT or MSTR has not been successfully executed.
fixed bus shunt table is full.
both BASEKV and the base voltage of bus IBUS are 0.0.
bus does not belong to a substation.
node not found in the substation of this bus.
node is not connected to any bus section of this bus.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
